title: Context Pack Frontmatter
description: Contract for a pre-compiled, token-budgeted context bundle assembled by the Context Engine (Encompass). Validates the YAML frontmatter of a context pack Markdown file.

purpose.description: The specific task this pack was assembled for. Drives just-in-time retrieval.

token_budget.description: Hard ceiling. Compress rather than overflow (target ~2000-4000).

token_estimate.description: Estimated tokens of the assembled pack; must be <= token_budget.

source_nodes.description: Lightweight node id handles included in this pack (dereferenced at assembly time).

schema_version.description: SemVer for the context pack format.
